channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'We can no longer afford to be blind': Danish startup raises funds to build underwater CCTV-like tech to track drones and more
item.description: Three engineering students raise €1 million to string AI-powered listening posts across the seabed.

item.title: OnePlus quitte l’Europe : la rédaction de Frandroid raconte ses souvenirs les plus marquants
item.description: OnePlus quitte l'Europe et l'Amérique du Nord après douze ans de présence dans l'Hexagone. Avant de définitivement tourner la page, plusieurs journalistes de la rédaction ont accepté de revenir sur ce qui les a marqués chez OnePlus, d'un smartphone culte à une publicité un poil forceuse qui restera dans les annales.

item.title: 700 escrocs, 20 centres d’appels : ce réseau criminel a fait des dizaines de milliers de victimes
item.description: La police vient de démanteler un vaste réseau criminel spécialisé dans les arnaques aux faux investissements. Baptisée « Operation Sunflower », l'enquête a duré près de quatre ans et s'est soldée par l'arrestation d'une série de criminels dans différents pays.

item.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
item.description: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.

item.title: FIFA Doesn’t Have a Plan to Deal With Climate Change
item.description: This year’s World Cup has faced sweltering heat and humidity. Now it may need to deal with wildfire smoke.

item.title: The Google Pixel Watch 5 leaks just keep coming, with details and renders everywhere — here's what's likely in store for the Android smartwatch
item.description: Google Pixel Watch 5: purported leaks of prices, renders, colors and more have hit the internet.

item.title: Balmuda NatureWind Studio Review: A Better Breeze
item.description: Balmuda has engineered a remarkably pleasant breeze with its new NatureWind Studio, but is it worth hundreds more than its competition?

item.title: TikTok is no longer banned on US government devices
item.description: US government officially lifts TikTok ban on federal devices.

item.title: Les nouveaux Huawei FreeClip 2 S, des écouteurs sans-fil au design de bijoux, sont déjà bradés à -200 €
item.description: Les Huawei FreeClip 2 S sont des écouteurs sans fil ouverts à clipser, comme des boucles d'oreilles, légers et élégants, en promo à 199,99 euros au lieu de 229,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Apple repasse devant Nvidia en Bourse, porté par l’effondrement du secteur des semi-conducteurs
item.description: Apple est redevenu un moment l'entreprise la plus valorisée au monde devant Nvidia lors de la séance du vendredi 17 juillet. Portée par l'enthousiasme autour d'Apple Intelligence, la marque à la pomme profite de l'effondrement des valeurs sur le marché des semi-conducteurs.

item.title: The Best Tech for Back to School
item.description: Get ready to crush your coursework or scoot to class in style with these back-to-school gear picks.

item.title: The Nutribullet Chill is the ice cream maker thats staying on my counter this summer
item.description: Nutribullet has entered the ice cream game with the Chill ice cream maker. It's compact enough for small spaces but effective at churning out smooth, creamy treats. But is it better than the Ninja Creami?

item.title: Prompt Injection Attacks Are Thwarting AI Hacking Agents
item.description: “Context bombing” tricks malicious AI agents into shutting down before they can do harm.

item.title: ‘We’ve actually been using the Harman Curve incorrectly’: GoldenSound's new Status earbuds aim to rewrite an industry standard and, having tried them against AirPods Pro, I like it…to a point
item.description: Status Audio and GoldenSound think we’ve been using the Harman Curve all wrong when it comes to earbuds, and their new collab will prove it

item.title: Heartstopper Forever has a brilliantly unexpected The Odyssey Easter egg in new Netflix movie — and it's not just that they both have the same release date
item.description: What do Heartstopper Forever and The Odyssey have in common? Aside from the same release date, there's a clever Greek Easter egg hidden in the new Netflix movie.

item.title: You can get Apple’s iOS 27 on your iPhone today. Try these 5 features first
item.description: Good news for Siri users, photo lovers, liquid glass haters, and anyone watching their diet. In June, Apple previewed its next major iOS update, iOS 27, which will become widely available for supported iPhones in September. As with all major iOS updates, installing the new operating system feels like getting an entirely new smartphone without having to buy one. With iOS 27, your existing iPhone will have more features, refinements, and tools....

item.title: We spent a year testing the best red light masks. We found 5 we love and 2 to avoid.
item.description: To find the best red light masks, Mashable reviewers spent months using LED face masks from Shark, Therabody, Solawave, and more.

item.title: Dune: Part Three footage is playing before The Odyssey. Heres how to catch it.
item.description: If you're watching "The Odyssey," you may get a sneak peek of "Dune: Part Three."

item.title: The Odyssey hints at 3 myths without detailing them. Here are the untold stories.
item.description: Who is Sinon in "The Odyssey" and who is Circe's bird sister? Let's dig into the text for the stories Christopher Nolan hints at.

item.title: How Christopher Nolan weaponized Matt Damons persona for The Odyssey
item.description: What if Odysseus isn't the hero the songs sing about? Keen casting makes Nolan's translation a cutting contemporary critique of American ideology.

item.title: These Pokémoan sex toys are actually kind of cute — shop the limited first-edition drop
item.description: Ten years after going viral, Geeky Sex Toys is releasing a newly evolved, limited-edition "Pokémoan" parody sex toy collection.

item.title: T-Mobile is handing over the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim yours
item.description: How to get the Apple iPhone for free. Score the Apple iPhone 17 or free with T-Mobile.

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for July 18
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on July 18 including the day's schedule, kickoff times, and livestream information.

item.title: How to watch France vs. England online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream France vs. England in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Odyssey cyclops was inspired by one of historys goriest paintings
item.description: Christopher Nolan has confirmed that "The Odyssey" cyclops Polyphemus was inspired by Francisco Goya's painting.

item.title: Grab a lifetime Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus license for just $54.99
item.description: Get Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus for Windows for just $54.99 and save $195 with a lifetime license that includes the essential productivity apps — no subscription fees.

item.title: Learn piano with 5 years of interactive lessons for $65
item.description: Learn piano with flowkey's Classic Plan for $64.97 (reg. $899) and get five years of interactive lessons, real-time feedback, and thousands of songs.

item.title: Learn up to 25 languages for $127 with this new Rosetta Stone Sapphire deal
item.description: New users can get a one-year Rosetta Stone Sapphire subscription with access to 25 languages for $127.20 (reg. $159).

item.title: The 9 best free dating apps that literally cost $0 to sign up and use
item.description: We tested the best free dating apps, from Hinge to Bumble. While it's easier for women to match for free, we have options for everybody
